title: ellisia torreyi var. bipinnatifida
intro: Ellisia torreyi var. bipinnatifida is a variety of the Ellisia torreyi plant, also known as the American cranesbill, a flowering plant native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Ellisia torreyi var. bipinnatifida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility in traditional medicine.
